item.name: Microsoft Copilot Create Subscription for Copilot Interaction Notifications

request.name: Microsoft Copilot Create Subscription for Copilot Interaction Notifications

description.content: Create a change notification subscription to monitor Copilot interactions across Microsoft 365 in real time. Enables proactive compliance checks, anomaly detection, and auditing of AI interactions. The resource path for Copilot interactions is /copilot/interactionHistory/getAllEnterpriseInteractions.

response.name: Subscription created successfully.

item.name: Microsoft Copilot Start a Chat Conversation

request.name: Microsoft Copilot Start a Chat Conversation

description.content: Start a new multi-turn conversation with Microsoft 365 Copilot. The Chat API allows you to programmatically engage in conversations using enterprise search grounding and web search grounding. Responses are grounded in Microsoft 365 data and web content while respecting all existing permissions and compliance controls. This API is currently in preview.

response.name: Conversation started and response returned successfully.

item.name: Microsoft Copilot List All Enterprise Copilot Interactions

request.name: Microsoft Copilot List All Enterprise Copilot Interactions

description.content: Retrieve all Copilot interactions across the organization for compliance and auditing purposes. Returns aiInteraction objects representing user prompts and Copilot responses across Microsoft 365 applications. Requires compliance administrator permissions.

query.description: OData filter expression to filter interactions by date range, user, or application.
Maximum number of interactions to return per page.
Pagination token for retrieving the next page of results.

response.name: List of Copilot interactions returned successfully.

description.content: Retrieve relevant text chunks from SharePoint, OneDrive, and Copilot connectors content for Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) scenarios.

Retrieve relevant text extracts from SharePoint, OneDrive, and Copilot connectors content that the calling user has access to, while respecting defined access controls within the tenant. Use this endpoint to ground generative AI solutions with Microsoft 365 data while optimizing for context recall. Results include text snippets with relevance scores, sensitivity labels, and optional resource metadata.

response.name: Retrieval results returned successfully.

description.content:
REST APIs under the Microsoft Graph /copilot/ namespace that enable secure access to Microsoft 365 Copilot capabilities including retrieval, search, chat, interaction export, and change notifications. These APIs provide production-ready AI capabilities that work directly with Microsoft 365 data while respecting existing permissions, sensitivity labels, compliance controls, and policy enforcement.

Contact Support:
 Name: Microsoft Graph Support
